user.description: Home of Flippers listens to BLE advertisements (including those relayed by Bluetooth proxies) to detect nearby Flipper Zero devices and BLE spam attacks.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Home of Flippers is already configured. Only one instance is allowed.

data.stale_timeout: Seconds before a Flipper is considered away
data.attack_window: Seconds an attack stays flagged as active
data.rate_limit_count: New Flippers per window before spoof-flood is assumed
